title: Building safe Payment Infrastructure for the autonomous economy — Steve Kaliski, Stripe
summary: Stripe presents infrastructure for enabling autonomous agents to execute real transactions safely. The approach addresses secure credential transmission and business discoverability to agents while implementing guardrails to prevent catastrophic autonomous spending risks.
